section.title: Architectural Interaction
section.p: The Policy Compute Engine (PCE) acts as the central brain, while Virtual Enforcement Nodes (VENs) provide visibility and enforcement at the workload level.
section.foreign:
graph TD PCE[PCE: Policy Compute Engine] VEN[VEN: Virtual Enforcement Node]
VEN -->|1. Flow & Context| PCE PCE -->|2. Calculated Policy| VEN VEN -->|3. Program OS Firewall| Firewall[OS Firewall]
